message:
chore: gitignore ephemeral test artifacts and Codex cargo home

Add test.jsonl, test_heal, test_heal.txt, ubs.jsonl (scratch test
output) and .codex-cargo-home/ (Codex build cache) to .gitignore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -144,3 +144,12 @@ filter_panics.py

 src/bin/test_duration.rs
 src/bin/test_time.rs
+
+# Ephemeral test output and scratch binaries
+/test.jsonl
+/test_heal
+/test_heal.txt
+/ubs.jsonl
+
+# Codex cargo home (build cache)
+.codex-cargo-home/
